title: Periodic scouring for new investment opportunities
description: On a recurring schedule (e.g. weekly), have the agent re-run a refined web search for new picks in the user's chosen investment domain and append or replace entries in data/top-picks.json. Notify the user when the panel changes so they know to come back.
blockers: Needs a scheduler / cron tool for agent runs.
Depends on the web-search exposure from the LLM-powered web search story.
